---
title: "Gallery"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

<style>
main.content {
  max-width: 1200px !important;
}

.gallery {
  column-count: 3;
  column-gap: 16px;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
}

.gallery-item {
  break-inside: avoid;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 14px;
}

.gallery-item img {
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
  border-radius: 14px;
  transition: transform 0.35s ease;
}

.gallery-item:hover img {
  transform: scale(1.03);
}

@media (max-width: 1000px) {
  .gallery {
    column-count: 2;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .gallery {
    column-count: 1;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="gallery">

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/IMG_5891.jpeg){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/gradpic.jpg){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/IMG_1270.JPG){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/5beez.jpeg){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/IMG_1658.jpeg){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/IMG_4250.jpeg){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/trainingimage.jpg){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/IMG_1401.jpeg){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/IMG_7505.jpeg){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/bdglogo.png){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/IMG_0427.jpeg){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/IMG_2664.jpeg){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/IMG_1292.JPG){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/IMG_4725.jpeg){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/IMG_1621.jpeg){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/IMG_1827.jpeg){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/IMG_6677.JPG){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/IMG_1657.jpeg){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

<div class="gallery-item">
![](photos/IMG_0602 (1).jpeg){.lightbox group="gallery"}
</div>

</div>
